case_title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. EDVIN HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, EDVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET, UNIT 321 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66621788)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66685783), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. SERVED MAY-13-2021, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, EDVIN DOES 1 TO X
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, EDVIN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, EDVIN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66689073)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 66621788) AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, EDVIN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40.60. THE ORIGINAL LEASE IS UNAVAILABLE. (TRANSACTION ID # 66621788) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66621788), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. SERVED MAY-13-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, EDVIN
